_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: On average, approximately 3.2% and 5.4% of the CD4+PD-1+ T cells expressed GATA3 and IL-4, respectively
details: Successfully detected Th2 cytokine on CD4+PD-1+ T cells; approximately 5.4% of CD4+PD-1+ T cells expressed IL-4
